reason: Verified that QA-20260505-211613-qbhi agent can execute browser commands and correctly report page title from https://example.com
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — SuperAgent application loaded successfully
Clicked on "QA-20260505-211613-qbhi" agent in sidebar — Agent chat view opened
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in input field — Message text populated in textbox
Clicked Send message button — Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working"
Waited 10 seconds for response — Agent completed browser operations in 8 seconds
Verified response text — Agent response displays "The page title is Example Domain." matching the expected result
Took final screenshot — Captured confirmation showing successful test completion
